article.title: Crypto Investor Haun Raises $1 Billion for New Funds, Expands to AI Agents
article.summary: Katie Haun, a former Andreessen Horowitz general partner and federal prosecutor who made her name investigating digital assets before investing in crypto startups, has raised $1 billion for new venture funds.
article.title_zh: 加密投資者 Haun 為新基金籌集 10 億美元，擴展至 AI Agents
article.summary_zh: 前 Andreessen Horowitz 合夥人、聯邦檢察官 Katie Haun 在調查數字資產並投資加密初創公司後成名，現已為新風險基金籌集 10 億美元。

article.title: Arize AI and Google Cloud lay down standardized telemetry mandate to keep enterprise agents in check
article.summary: The essentially composable nature of modern enterprise software stacks enables architectural freedom. Software developers are able to take advantage of componentized and containerized logic to create optimized code deployments, which can themselves be shifted between workloads that traverse multi-cloud instances . Agentic functions are enjoying some of the same freedom of movement, but unstandardized AI agent telemetry leaves us in the Wild West. Developers are empowering agents in production with the ability to call multiple system tools, invoke connections to AI models (language, visual and so on, both large and small) and even “improve” user requests and hand off work to other domain-specific agents. That’s all great news for system adaptability, but it’s a night
article.title_zh: Arize AI 和 Google Cloud 制定標準化遙測強制措施以管控企業代理
article.summary_zh: 現代企業軟體堆棧的可組合性質使開發人員能夠利用組件化和容器化邏輯來建立優化的程式碼部署，這些部署可以在跨越多雲環境的工作負載之間轉移。

article.title: Why would I want an AI agent to replace my phone?
article.summary: You can’t go anywhere on the internet today without running into AI. In some cases, that’s useful. AI can do some amazing things. On the other hand, it often feels like we’re watching someone reinvent the wheel. Now, word on the street is that OpenAI wants to build its own phone with an experience built around AI agents. Put simply, I think that sounds horrible. more…
article.title_zh: 為什麼我會想要 AI 代理來取代我的手機？
article.summary_zh: 隨著 AI 無所不在，OpenAI 據聞計畫打造自己的手機，帶來全新的體驗。

article.title: Google finally explains why AICore uses so much storage
article.summary: Credit: Andy Walker / Android Authority TL;DR Google has updated its support page to reveal why the AICore app can use a ton of your storage. Google says the app temporarily keeps both new and old versions of an AI model in case the new update experiences an error. AICore enables on-device AI features like text summarization, writing tools, and proofreading. Google’s AICore app is key for on-device AI on your Android phone , as it maintains and updates your device’s AI models. However, one frequent complaint is that the app can occupy a ton of storage. Google has now shed more light on this issue, and it turns out this is intended behavior. Don’t want to miss the best from Android Authority ?
article.title_zh: Google 終於解釋為什麼 AICore 使用了這麼多存儲空間
article.summary_zh: Google 更新支持頁面說明 AICore 應用占用大量存儲的原因：應用會暫時保留新舊版本的 AI 模型以防新更新出現錯誤。

article.title: Google訂閱用戶突破3.5億　雲端營收達200億美元卻喊「運算產能吃緊」
article.summary: Google母公司Alphabet在2026年第1季展現強勁的AI變現能力，受惠於雲端基礎設施與自研晶片的優勢，營收與獲利均超越預期，投資前景明顯優於同業大廠。不僅雲端業務首度突破200億美元大關，整體AI基礎建設的擴張也顯示出這場大廠間的軍備競賽已進入白熱化階段，四大超大規模業者2026年合計資本支出計畫已攀升至7...
article.title_zh: Google訂閱用戶突破3.5億　雲端營收達200億美元卻喊「運算產能吃緊」
article.summary_zh: Google母公司Alphabet在2026年第1季展現強勁的AI變現能力，受惠於雲端基礎設施與自研晶片的優勢，營收與獲利均超越預期，投資前景明顯優於同業大廠。不僅雲端業務首度突破200億美元大關，整體AI基礎建設的擴張也顯示出這場大廠間的軍備競賽已進入白熱化階段，四大超大規模業者2026年合計資本支出計畫已攀升至7...

article.title: Anthropic and OpenAI are both launching joint ventures for enterprise AI services
article.summary: Both Anthropic and OpenAI have partnered with asset managers to more aggressively market their enterprise AI products.
article.title_zh: Anthropic 和 OpenAI 都在推出企業 AI 服務合資企業
article.summary_zh: Anthropic 和 OpenAI 都與資產管理公司合作，以更積極地推銷他們的企業 AI 產品。

article.title: Scale vs service – why the top 10 operators don’t own the MDU market (Analyst Angle)
article.summary: The Q4 2025 broadband subscriber tally clarifies who owns the pipes feeding American homes, including multi-dweller units (MDUs) but it tells only half the story for multifamily. The same operators that dominate the national rankings occupy a far more ambiguous…
article.title_zh: 規模對服務 — 為什麼前十大運營商不擁有 MDU 市場（分析角度）
article.summary_zh: Q4 2025 寬帶訂戶統計闡明了誰擁有供應美國家庭的管道，包括多住戶單位（MDU），但這只是多家庭故事的一半。

article.title: OpenAI Finalizes $10 Billion Joint Venture With PE Firms to Deploy AI
article.summary: OpenAI and Anthropic PBC are both forming joint ventures with some of world’s most recognizable financial institutions in a race to drive more adoption of their artificial intelligence tools.
article.title_zh: OpenAI 與私募股權公司敲定 100 億美元合資企業以部署 AI
article.summary_zh: OpenAI 和 Anthropic PBC 都在與全球頂級金融機構組建合資企業，以加快其人工智能工具的採用。

article.title: Anthropic傳計畫採購英國AI新創公司Fractile的晶片
article.summary: The Information報導，Anthropic計畫向英國AI晶片新創公司Fractile採購晶片，以降低AI推論應用的高昂成本。
article.title_zh: Anthropic傳計畫採購英國AI新創公司Fractile的晶片
article.summary_zh: The Information報導，Anthropic計畫向英國AI晶片新創公司Fractile採購晶片，以降低AI推論應用的高昂成本。

article.title: Gemini app getting full redesign that overhauls every part of the UI
article.summary: Google has been working on a Gemini app redesign for the past few months , and we now have our first look at the full overhaul. more…
article.title_zh: Gemini 應用程式將進行全面重新設計，革新整個 UI
article.summary_zh: Google 過去幾個月一直在進行 Gemini 應用程式重新設計，現在首次展示了完整的改版。
